notes: DigitalTQ community sample: 541 packs (2164 cards, table internally exact), corroborated by the CardSupply 778-pack opening reported by Dexerto (CC Charizard 1/97 vs 1/77 here). 4-card packs, no commons/uncommons: modeled as one 4-card slot aggregated from per-card counts. Rare vs rare-holo split follows pokemontcg.io cel25 and matches the empirical per-card rates. Classic Collection subset (40.1% of packs, 217/2164 of cards) has no rarity id in this engine, so its mass sits on the base 'rare' bucket — pack EV therefore EXCLUDES Classic Collection value. Gold Mew (2 pulls) folded into rare-holo per pokemontcg.io. No booster display (packs only sold in bundles/collections); ETB holds 10 Celebrations packs (the 5 extra non-Celebrations packs it also contains are not modeled).
